required_protocol_sentence: DKRs are discovery-worker scopes; PKRs are progression-worker execution units; there is no CKR worker.
assignment: Independently validate only the source-interface TSDoc slice in the shared publishing clone. Confirm the two metric hashes, audit every source diff against exact_start_head, prove there are exactly 151 added TSDoc entries, zero source deletions, zero non-TSDoc source changes, and no interface-denominator shrink. Rebuild affected declarations and rerun the public-contract checker with a /tmp PR snapshot. Confirm public_api_interface_count=153 and public_api_tsdoc_gap_count=0. Review TSDoc for meaningful contract wording rather than placeholder repetition. Treat the known committed lite-lint type narrowing error as a separate unresolved gate, not as a reason to alter source. Do not edit any file.
stop_rule: Accept or reject the TSDoc claim once from independent replay and stop.
output_schema: Claim-by-claim accepted/rejected verdicts, exact commands/values, semantic sample review, and remaining blocked gates.
